effect.content: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.
YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

governance.preferred_form: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

quotes: YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.

rules.intent: Maintain exact approved patient-facing campaign headline compliance.
rules.rule_text: Campaign materials must verbatim use the approved headline: 'YOU DESERVE MORE. So there's LISRAYA—the first targeted treatment for dermatomyositis.'

effect.content: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can: Increase your muscle strength / Improve your skin symptoms / Rely less on steroids / Do more of the activities you love.

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
*Increase your muscle strength*
*Improve your skin symptoms*
*Rely less on steroids*
*Do more of the activities you love*

governance.preferred_form:
LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
* Increase your muscle strength
* Improve your skin symptoms
* Rely less on steroids
* Do more of the activities you love.

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks the specific inflammatory signals that drive dermatomyositis, so you can:
Increase your muscle strength
Improve your skin symptoms
Rely less on steroids
Do more of the activities you love.

rules.intent: Ensure medically and regulatory-approved claim structures are precisely stated.
rules.rule_text: When presenting product benefits, LISRAYA must be described as a once-daily FDA-approved pill that blocks specific inflammatory signals to enable: increased muscle strength, improved skin symptoms, reduced steroid reliance, and doing more loved activities.

quotes: Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease.
...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the 'on' position.

rules.intent: Provide approved primary and alternative conceptual framings for patients to comprehend targeted DM treatment.
rules.rule_text: Explain LISRAYA's Mechanism of Action (MOA) using one of the approved patterns: the primary contrast ('Unlike other treatments for dermatomyositis (DM), which suppress the immune system generally, LISRAYA targets the root cause of the disease') or the simplified switch analogy ('...LISRAYA works by turning off the specific inflammatory switches that are stuck in the "on" position').

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

governance.preferred_form: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

quotes: LISRAYA is a once-daily pill—you can take it at home or anywhere you like, with no shots or infusions required.

rules.intent: Properly emphasize patient convenience parameters approved by clinical and legal review.
rules.rule_text: Administration claims must frame the treatment as a once-daily pill taken anywhere (home or elsewhere) requiring no injections, shots, or clinical infusions.

effect.content: Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.

rules.intent: Maintain compliance on doctor communication prompts.
rules.rule_text: The primary call to action for consulting a medical professional must explicitly state: 'Talk to your doctor about LISRAYA, the DM treatment you may be looking for.'

rules.intent: Ensure trademark accuracy and clear service parameters for patient onboarding programs.
rules.rule_text: The patient support program must always be referenced by its official trademarked name, 'My Compass Support', and described around PAL (Personalized Communication via PAL - text, phone, email, in person) and Authorization Support services.
